R_100: 0,43,57,49,44,10,8,12,96,45,37,65,34,80,76,17,5,33,38,25,3,54,93,15,58,22,66,74,84,90,52,68,48,35,1,81,73,55,97,60,18,32,99,100,47,31,82,6,13,7,24,98,19,83,70,94,89,62,36,41,42,59,16,71,40,92,95,9,0|87,28,63,26,77,85,51,88,29,75,20,21,30,14,72,91,69,53,4,-1,79,56,86,27,67,2,50,11,78,39,64,23,61,46|1,5,10,13,18,23,26,30,35,40,43,44,46,49,52,54,57,60,63,-1,2,10,11,15,20,23,28,33,41,44,45,50,54,56|5,8,12,17,22,25,29,34,39,43,44,46,48,52,54,57,59,61,69,-1,5,11,15,18,22,26,31,37,43,45,50,52,55,58
